---
title: 'Vision and Confession'
date: '2012-01-21T08:21:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2857351171631599849'
blogger_filename: '/2012/01/vision-and-confession.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Finances'
---

<br /><h3 align="center" style="line-height: 150%; margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in; text-align: center;">   <span style="font-size: 24pt; line-height: 150%;">Financial Vision<o:p></o:p></span></h3><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; text-align: justify; text-indent: 35.45pt;">Many times having a clear vision of your goals is a good place to start. Use the following to make your own financial Vision and Mission Statements!<o:p></o:p></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; text-align: justify; text-indent: 35.45pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; text-align: justify;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <b>VISION</b>: <i>I see myself fully supplied in every area of my life so that I can give to every good work. I see myself debt free. I see myself taking new ground every day. </i><o:p></o:p></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; text-align: justify;"><i><br /></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; text-align: justify;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <b>MISSION</b>: <i>I will help my Vision come to pass by taking control over my spending, and utilizing the financial tools given to me. I will take action to prevent myself from paying unnecessary fees. I will put money aside for Tithe AND Offering. I will put money into my Savings Account. I will be a good steward over my money and make wise purchases. I will make sure my savings money is getting the best possible rate of return. I will pay down and pay off debt, aggressively! I will make wise decisions in borrowing and credit, by planning ahead, researching, and taking my time before making a decision.</i> <o:p></o:p></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; text-align: justify;"><i><br /></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; text-align: justify;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <b>CONFESSION</b><i>: I call myself supplied, to the full, until it overflows onto others around me! I call myself debt free! I call myself a supplier of others needs, wants, and desires! I am Godâ€™s distribution center to meet the needs of others!</i><o:p></o:p></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; text-align: justify;"><i><br /></i></div><h3 align="center" style="line-height: 150%; margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in; text-align: center;">   <span style="font-size: 24pt; line-height: 150%;">Vision Scriptures</span><span style="font-size: 18pt; font-weight: normal; line-height: 150%;"><o:p></o:p></span></h3><h2 align="center" style="text-align: center;">   <i><span style="font-size: 10pt;">2 Corinthians 9<o:p></o:p></span></i></h2><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><i><sup><span style="font-size: 10pt;">8</span></sup></i><i><span style="font-size: 10pt;">And God is able to make all grace abound toward you, that you, always having all sufficiency in all things, may have an abundance for every good work.<sup><o:p></o:p></sup></span></i></div><h2 align="center" style="text-align: center;">   <i><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Matthew 25<o:p></o:p></span></i></h2><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><i><sup><span style="font-size: 10pt;">23</span></sup></i><i><span style="font-size: 10pt;">His lord said to him, â€˜Well done, good and faithful servant; you have been faithful over a few things, I will make you ruler over many things. Enter into the joy of your lord.â€™<sup><o:p></o:p></sup></span></i></div><h2 align="center" style="text-align: center;">   <i><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Genesis 1<o:p></o:p></span></i></h2><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><i><sup><span style="font-size: 10pt;">28</span></sup></i><i><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Then God blessed them, and God said to them, â€œBe fruitful and multiply; fill the earth and subdue it; have dominion over the fish of the sea, over the birds of the air, and over every living thing that moves on the earth.â€<sup><o:p></o:p></sup></span></i></div><h2 align="center" style="text-align: center;">   <i><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Deuteronomy 28<o:p></o:p></span></i></h2><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 5.0pt; margin-left: 0in; margin-right: 0in; margin-top: 5.0pt; text-align: center;"><i><sup><span style="font-size: 10pt;">12</span></sup></i><i><span style="font-size: 10pt;">The LORD will open to you His good treasure, the heavens, to give the rain to your land in its season, and to bless all the work of your hand. You shall lend to many nations, but you shall not borrow.<sup><o:p></o:p></sup></span></i></div><h2 align="center" style="text-align: center;">   <i><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Romans 13<o:p></o:p></span></i></h2><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><i><sup><span style="font-size: 10pt;">8</span></sup></i><i><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Owe no one anything except to love one another, for he who loves another has fulfilled the law.<sup><o:p></o:p></sup></span></i></div><h2 align="center" style="text-align: center;">   <i><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Genesis 18<o:p></o:p></span></i></h2><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; text-align: center;"><i><sup><span style="font-size: 10pt; line-height: 150%;">18</span></sup></i><i><span style="font-size: 10pt; line-height: 150%;"> Abraham will surely become a great and powerful nation, and all nations on earth will be blessed through him.</span></i><span style="font-size: 10pt; line-height: 150%;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; text-align: center;"><b><span style="font-size: 10pt; line-height: 150%;">Galations 3</span></b><b><span style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: white; background-image: initial; background-origin: initial; font-size: 10pt; line-height: 150%;"> <i><o:p></o:p></i></span></b></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; text-align: justify;"><span class="versenum"><b><i><span style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: white; background-image: initial; background-origin: initial; font-size: 10pt; line-height: 150%;">9</span></i></b></span><span class="apple-converted-space"><i><span style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: white; background-image: initial; background-origin: initial; font-size: 10pt; line-height: 150%;">&nbsp;</span></i></span><span class="apple-style-span"><i><span style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: white; background-image: initial; background-origin: initial; font-size: 10pt; line-height: 150%;">So then those who are of faith are blessed with believing Abraham.</span></i></span><i><span style="font-size: 10pt; line-height: 150%;"><o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; text-align: justify;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; text-align: justify;"><br /></div><h3 align="center" style="line-height: 150%; margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in; text-align: center;">   <span style="font-size: 24pt; line-height: 150%;">Offering Confession<o:p></o:p></span></h3><div class="MsoNormal">Used by EMIC 2010:<o:p></o:p></div><div class="MsoNormal"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; text-align: justify;">As we give todayâ€™s tithe and offerings we believe we receive:<o:p></o:p></div><ul style="margin-top: 0in;" type="disc"><li class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; text-align: justify;">Jobs or Better Jobs<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; text-align: justify;">Raises and Bonuses<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; text-align: justify;">Benefits<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; text-align: justify;">Sales and Commissions<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; text-align: justify;">Estates and Inheritances<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; text-align: justify;">Interest and Income<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; text-align: justify;">Rebates and Returns<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; text-align: justify;">Checks in the mail<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; text-align: justify;">Gifts and Suprises<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; text-align: justify;">Lost money found<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; text-align: justify;">Bills Paid Off<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; text-align: justify;">Debts Demolished<o:p></o:p></li><li class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; text-align: justify;">And Royalties Received.<o:p></o:p></li></ul><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 150%; text-align: justify;">This is my year of overflow! I expect more out of heaven than ever before. I receive my harvest by faith in Jesus Name!<o:p></o:p><br /><br /><a href="http://www.amazon.com/Banking-Basics-Believers-Introduction-principles/dp/1453815619/ref=sr_1_2?ie=UTF8&amp;qid=1324162895&amp;sr=8-2" style="text-align: -webkit-auto; text-indent: -24px;" target="_blank">From Banking Basics For Believers, Available on Amazon</a><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="http://www.amazon.com/Banking-Basics-Believers-Introduction-principles/dp/1453815619/ref=sr_1_2?ie=UTF8&amp;qid=1324162895&amp;sr=8-2" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;" target="_blank"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bankingbasicsforbelievers-cover-final-bb7ed64683ae.jpg" /></a></div><br /></div>
